member.name: T:Common_Lib.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: M:Common_Lib.DbOperations.SubItems.UpdateSubItem_Store_Mapping(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates mappings of given store to Items
member.param: Contains a comma separated list of Sub Item IDs which are marked as mapped in gridview (either already or by user)
Contains a comma separated list of Sub Item IDs which are marked as unmapped in gridview (either already or by user)

member.name: M:Common_Lib.DbOperations.SubItems.DeleteSubItem(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns Booleans and fills Sub Item Usage Text MEssage in ByRef Param if the Item is being used . In this case item is not deleted
